executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Create Playwright tests to run against http://localhost:3000. Scenarios: (A) Quick View add-to-cart with size/color: find a product with sizes on home or collections, open quick view, select a size, add to cart, assert mini cart shows 'Size:' and then navigate to /cart and assert size is displayed. (B) Logout preserves cart: after adding, open header profile menu, click Logout, reload /cart, assert item still present. If no login is active, skip login and only assert persistence across refresh. (C) Mobile mini-cart flow: emulate iPhone 12 viewport, add item, open mini cart, click 'View Cart'; assert overlay closed and URL is /cart. Include robustness: if no product with sizes found, skip with informative message. Use data-testids where available or fallback to visible text. Save a markdown report.
